exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: Target 8 per set. Hit a clean 3x8 @ 72.5 at RPE 8 last time. Hold — get all 3 sets at RPE<=7 before adding 2.5kg. Brace, push hips back, bar close.

exercises.name: Pull-Up Parallel Close Grip
exercises.notes: Bodyweight. 4x5 at RPE 8 last time. Progress by reps — chase 6 on the first 1-2 sets before adding load.

exercises.name: Machine Seated Row
exercises.notes: Target 10 per set (you keep starting at 12 — control it). Last time 12/10/10 @ 25 at RPE 10. Hold weight, bring RPE down to <=8 with clean 10s before adding.

exercises.name: EZ Bar Curl
exercises.notes: Target 10-12. Hit 4x10 @ 30 at RPE 10 — your hardest lift here. Hold at 30, lock a clean 4x10-12 at lower RPE before adding.

exercises.name: Face Pull
exercises.notes: Up 2.5kg (35 -> 37.5). Did 3x15 @ 35 at RPE 7 — had room. Keep 15 reps, slow tempo, squeeze rear delts.

exercises.name: Cable Crunch
exercises.notes: Target 15 per set. You self-progressed to 65 last time (15/15/15) at RPE 9. Hold at 65, get all 3 at RPE<=8 before adding. Kneeling, facing the stack.
